summary: Regression test PASSED - Backend modularization from monolithic server.py (2593 lines, 59 routes) to 17 separate route modules verified with zero breakage. All 38 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend login and dashboard load correctly.
test_credentials: Used GM (ctyler.gm@slmco.local), Owner (sadam.owner@slmco.local), Supervisor (hjohnny.super@slmco.local) with password SLMCo2026!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified backend modularization regression test. All 17 route modules work correctly: auth.py, system.py, public.py, submissions.py, equipment.py, jobs.py, crew_access.py, users.py, notifications.py, rubrics.py, standards.py, reviews.py, rapid_reviews.py, training.py, analytics.py, exports.py, integrations.py. Server.py is now a lean orchestrator (~791 lines) that imports all route modules. All paginated endpoints return {items: [...], pagination: {...}} format. Dashboard shows 23 submissions, 53 jobs, 16 owner queue items, 1 export ready.
